Class KeYJavaASTFactory

java.lang.Object
de.uka.ilkd.key.java.KeYJavaASTFactory
Direct Known Subclasses:
CreateArrayMethodBuilder
public abstract class KeYJavaASTFactory extends Object
The KeYASTFactory helps building KeY Java AST structures.

  • Constructor Details

    • KeYJavaASTFactory

      public KeYJavaASTFactory()

  • Method Details

    • assign

      public static CopyAssignment assign(Expression lhs, Expression rhs)
      creates an assignment lhs:=rhs

    • assign

      public static CopyAssignment assign(Expression lhs, Expression rhs, PositionInfo posInfo)
      creates an assignment lhs:=rhs

    • assign

      public static CopyAssignment assign(ExtList parameters)
      Create an assignment.
      Parameters:
      parameters - the assignment parameters (variable, expression) as ExtList
      Returns:
      a new CopyAssignment as defined by parameters

    • attribute

      public static Expression attribute(ReferencePrefix prefix, ProgramVariable field)
      creates an attribute access prefix.field

    • declare

      public static LocalVariableDeclaration declare(ProgramElementName name, TypeReference typeRef)
      creates a local variable declaration typeRef name;

    • declare

      public static LocalVariableDeclaration declare(ProgramElementName name, KeYJavaType type)
      Create a local variable declaration without initialization. 
      type name;
      Parameters:
      name - the ProgramElementName of the variable to be declared
      type - the static KeYJavaType of the variable to be declared
      Returns:
      a new LocalVariableDeclaration of a variable with static type type and name name

    • declare

      public static LocalVariableDeclaration declare(ProgramElementName name, Expression init, KeYJavaType type)
      create a local variable declaration

      type name = init;

    • declare

      public static LocalVariableDeclaration declare(IProgramVariable var, Expression init, KeYJavaType type)
      Create a local variable declaration. 
      type var = init;
      Parameters:
      var - the named and typed IProgramVariable to be declared
      init - the Expression var is initialized with
      type - the static KeYJavaType of var
      Returns:
      a LocalVariableDeclaration of var with static type type and initial value init

    • declare

      public static LocalVariableDeclaration declare(Services services, String name, Expression initializer, KeYJavaType type)
      Create a local variable declaration with a unique name. 
      type name{unique} = initializer;
      Parameters:
      services - the Services whose VariableNamer is used to determine a unique variable name
      name - the String on which the variable's unique name is based
      initializer - the Expression the declared variable is initialized with
      type - the static KeYJavaType of the to be declared variable
      Returns:
      a LocalVariableDeclaration of variable named uniquely after name with static type type and initial value initializer

    • declare

      public static LocalVariableDeclaration declare(IProgramVariable var, KeYJavaType type)
      Create a local variable declaration without initialization. 
      type var;
      Parameters:
      var - the named and typed IProgramVariable to be declared
      type - the static KeYJavaType of var
      Returns:
      a LocalVariableDeclaration of var with static type type

    • declare

      public static LocalVariableDeclaration declare(String name, KeYJavaType type)
      create a local variable declaration

    • parameterDeclaration

      public static ParameterDeclaration parameterDeclaration(JavaInfo javaInfo, KeYJavaType kjt, String name)
      create a parameter declaration

    • parameterDeclaration

      public static ParameterDeclaration parameterDeclaration(JavaInfo javaInfo, KeYJavaType kjt, IProgramVariable var)
      Create a parameter declaration. 
      kjt var
      Parameters:
      javaInfo - the Java model containing kjt
      kjt - the static KeYJavaType of var
      var - the named and typed IProgramVariable to be declared as parameter
      Returns:
      a ParameterDeclaration of var with static type kjt

    • parameterDeclaration

      public static ParameterDeclaration parameterDeclaration(JavaInfo javaInfo, String type, String name)

    • parenthesizedExpression

      public static ParenthesizedExpression parenthesizedExpression(Expression expression)
      Create a parenthesized expression. 
      (expression)
      Parameters:
      expression - the Expression to be parenthesized
      Returns:
      a new ParenthesizedExpression of expression

    • passiveExpression

      public static PassiveExpression passiveExpression(Expression expression)
      Create an inactive expression.
      Parameters:
      expression - the Expression to be marked inactive
      Returns:
      a new PassiveExpression version of expression

    • localVariable

      public static ProgramVariable localVariable(String name, KeYJavaType kjt)
      create a local variable

    • localVariable

      public static LocationVariable localVariable(ProgramElementName name, KeYJavaType kjt)
      create a local variable

    • localVariable

      public static ProgramVariable localVariable(Services services, String name, KeYJavaType type)
      Create a local variable with a unique name.
      Parameters:
      services - the Services whose VariableNamer is used
      name - the String on which the variable's unique name is based
      type - the variable's static KeYJavaType
      Returns:
      a new ProgramVariable of static type type and with a unique name based on name

    • logicalAndOperator

      public static LogicalAnd logicalAndOperator(Expression left, Expression right)
      Create a logical and operator. 
      left & right
      Parameters:
      left - the left operand Expression
      right - the right operand Expression
      Returns:
      a new LogicalAnd of left and right

    • logicalOrOperator

      public static LogicalOr logicalOrOperator(Expression left, Expression right)
      Create a logical or operator. 
      left | right
      Parameters:
      left - the left operand Expression
      right - the right operand Expression
      Returns:
      a new LogicalOr of left and right

    • catchClause

      public static Catch catchClause(ExtList parameters)
      Create a catch clause.
      Parameters:
      parameters - the catch clause parameters (exception, body) as ExtList
      Returns:
      a new Catch as defined by parameters

    • catchClause

      public static Catch catchClause(ParameterDeclaration param, StatementBlock body)
      create a catch clause

    • catchClause

      public static Catch catchClause(ParameterDeclaration parameter, Statement[] statements)
      Create a catch clause. 
      catch (parameter) {
    statements
}
      Parameters:
      parameter - the to be caught ParameterDeclaration
      statements - the body Statements
      Returns:
      a new Catch clause for execution of statements in case of parameter

    • catchClause

      public static Catch catchClause(JavaInfo javaInfo, String param, KeYJavaType kjt, StatementBlock body)
      Create a catch clause. 
      catch (kjt param)
   body
      Parameters:
      javaInfo - the JavaInfo containing kjt
      param - the String name of the exception object variable
      kjt - the KeYJavaType of the exception object variable
      body - the StatementBlock catch clause body
      Returns:
      a new Catch with parameter param of static type kjt and body body

    • catchClause

      public static Catch catchClause(JavaInfo javaInfo, String param, String type, StatementBlock body)
      Create a catch clause. 
      catch (type param)
   body
      Parameters:
      javaInfo - the JavaInfo containing a KeYJavaType named type
      param - the String name of the exception object variable
      type - the String name of the exception object variable's KeYJavaType
      body - the StatementBlock catch clause body
      Returns:
      a new Catch with parameter param of static type type and body body

    • throwClause

      public static Throw throwClause(Expression e)
      Create a throw clause. 
      throw e
      Parameters:
      e - the throw Expression
      Returns:
      a new Throw statement with expression e

    • transactionStatement

      public static TransactionStatement transactionStatement(int type)
      Create a transaction statement.
      Parameters:
      type - the transaction statement type
      Returns:
      a new TransactionStatement of type type

    • trueGuard

      public static Guard trueGuard()
      Create a true condition.
      Returns:
      a new Guard with expression true

    • whileLoop

      public static Statement whileLoop(Expression condition, Statement body)
      Create a while loop. 
      while (condition)
    body
      Parameters:
      condition - the loop condition Expression
      body - the loop body Statement
      Returns:
      a new While loop defined by condition and body

    • whileLoop

      public static While whileLoop(Expression condition, Statement body, PositionInfo position)
      Create a while loop at a specific source position. 
      while (condition)
    body
      Parameters:
      condition - the loop condition Expression
      body - the loop body Statement
      position - the new source element's PositionInfo
      Returns:
      a new While loop defined by condition and body, and positioned at position

    • returnClause

      public static Return returnClause(Expression e)
      Create a return clause. 
      return e
      Parameters:
      e - the return Expression
      Returns:
      a new Return statement with expression e

    • ifThen

      public static If ifThen(Expression guard, Statement then)
      Create an if statement with no else branch. 
      if (guard)
   then
      Parameters:
      guard - the if statement condition Expression
      then - the if statement then branch Statement
      Returns:
      an If with expression guard and then branch then

    • ifThen

      public static If ifThen(Expression guard, Statement... statements)
      Create an if statement with no else branch. 
      if (guard) {
   statements
}
      Parameters:
      guard - the if statement condition Expression
      statements - the if statement then branch Statements
      Returns:
      an If with condition guard and then branch statements

    • ifThen

      public static If ifThen(Expression guard, Then then)
      Create an if statement with no else branch. 
      if (guard)
   then
      Parameters:
      guard - the if statement condition Expression
      then - the if statement then branch Then
      Returns:
      an If with expression guard and then branch then

    • ifStatement

      public static If ifStatement(ExtList parameters)
      Create an if statement.
      Parameters:
      parameters - the if statement parameters (guard, body, else branch) as ExtList
      Returns:
      a new If as defined by parameters

    • ifElse

      public static If ifElse(Expression guard, Then then, Else els)
      Create an if statement including an else branch. 
      if (guard)
   then
else
   els
      Parameters:
      guard - the if statement condition Expression
      then - the if statement then branch Statement
      els - the if statement else branch Statement
      Returns:
      an If with expression guard, then branch then and else branch els

    • ifElse

      public static Statement ifElse(Expression guard, Statement thenStatement, Statement elseStatement)
      Create an if clause. 
      if (guard)
   thenStatement
else
   elseStatement
      Parameters:
      guard - the if clause condition Expression
      thenStatement - the if clause then branch Statement
      elseStatement - the if clause else branch Statement
      Returns:
      a new If with condition guard, then branch thenStatement and else branch elseStatement

    • breakStatement

      public static Break breakStatement(Label l)
      Create a break statement.
      Parameters:
      l - the break destination Label
      Returns:
      a new Break with label l

    • breakStatement

      public static Statement breakStatement(Label label, PositionInfo positionInfo)

    • caseBlock

      public static Case caseBlock(ExtList parameters, Expression expression, PositionInfo position)
      Create a case block.
      Parameters:
      parameters - the case block parameters (body) as ExtList
      expression - the case block Expression
      position - the new source element's PositionInfo
      Returns:
      a new Case as defined by parameters and expression

    • caseBlock

      public static Case caseBlock(Expression expression, Statement statement)
      Create a case block. 
      case (expression)
    statement
      Parameters:
      expression - the case Expression
      statement - the to be executed Statement
      Returns:
      a new Case for execution of statement in case of expression

    • caseBlock

      public static Case caseBlock(Expression expression, Statement[] statements)
      Create a case block. 
      case (expression) {
    statements
}
      Parameters:
      expression - the case Expression
      statements - the to be executed Statements
      Returns:
      a new Case for execution of statements in case of expression

    • continueStatement

      public static Continue continueStatement(Label label)

    • emptyStatement

      public static EmptyStatement emptyStatement()
      Create an empty statement.
      Returns:
      a new EmptyStatement

    • enhancedForLoop

      public static EnhancedFor enhancedForLoop(ExtList parameters)
      Create an enhanced for loop.
      Parameters:
      parameters - the loop definition parameters (initializer, guard, body) as ExtList
      Returns:
      a new For as defined by parameters

    • equalsNullOperator

      public static Equals equalsNullOperator(Expression expression)
      Create an equality comparison with null. 
      expression == null
      Parameters:
      expression - the Expression to be compared against null
      Returns:
      a new Equals that compares expression against null

    • equalsOperator

      public static Equals equalsOperator(Expression left, Expression right)
      Create an equals operator. 
      left == right
      Parameters:
      left - the left operand Expression
      right - the right operand Expression
      Returns:
      a new Equals of left and right

    • equalsOperator

      public static Equals equalsOperator(ExtList operands)
      Create an equals operator. 
      operand{1} == operand{2}
      Parameters:
      operands - the operands ExtList
      Returns:
      a new Equals of operands

    • executionContext

      public static ExecutionContext executionContext(KeYJavaType classType, IProgramMethod method, ReferencePrefix reference)
      Create an execution context.
      Parameters:
      classType - the enclosing class KeYJavaType
      method - the enclosing IProgramMethod defined in classType
      reference - the ReferencePrefix method is called on
      Returns:
      a new ExecutionContext for calls on reference to method from classType

    • insertStatementInBlock

      public static StatementBlock insertStatementInBlock(Statement statement, StatementBlock block)
      Insert a statement in a block of statements.
      Parameters:
      statement - the Statement to be inserted into block
      block - the StatementBlock statement is inserted into
      Returns:
      a new StatementBlock that contains both the Statements from block and statement

    • insertStatementInBlock

      public static StatementBlock insertStatementInBlock(Statement[] stmnt, StatementBlock b)
      inserts the given statements at the begin of the block
      Parameters:
      stmnt - array of Statement those have to be inserted
      b - the Statementblock where to insert

    • insertStatementInBlock

      public static StatementBlock insertStatementInBlock(StatementBlock stmnt, StatementBlock b)
      inserts the given statements at the begin of the block
      Parameters:
      stmnt - array of Statement those have to be inserted
      b - the Statementblock where to insert

    • insertStatementInBlock

      public static StatementBlock insertStatementInBlock(StatementBlock block, Statement[] statements)
      Create a block where the given statements come after the given block. 
      block
statements
      Parameters:
      block - the original StatementBlock
      statements - the inserted Statements
      Returns:
      a new StatementBlock that contains block first and statements second

    • instanceOf

      public static Instanceof instanceOf(Expression expression, KeYJavaType type)
      Create an instance of operator. 
      expression instance of type
      Parameters:
      expression - the Expression operand, whose runtime type is to be checked
      type - the KeYJavaType operand expression's type is checked against
      Returns:
      a new Instanceof for checking expression's type against type

    • declareZero

      public static LocalVariableDeclaration declareZero(KeYJavaType type, IProgramVariable variable)
      Create a local variable declaration that assigns zero initially. 
      type variable = 0;
      Parameters:
      type - the static KeYJavaType of variable
      variable - the named and typed IProgramVariable to be declared
      Returns:
      a new LocalVariableDeclaration of variable with static type type and initial value zero

    • declareMethodCall

      public static LocalVariableDeclaration declareMethodCall(KeYJavaType type, IProgramVariable variable, ReferencePrefix reference, String method)
      Create a local variable declaration that assigns a method's return value initially. 
      type variable = reference.method();
      Parameters:
      type - the static KeYJavaType of variable
      variable - the named and typed IProgramVariable to be declared
      reference - the ReferencePrefix the method is called on
      method - the method's name String
      Returns:
      a new LocalVariableDeclaration of variable with static type type and initial value reference.method()

    • declareMethodCall

      public static LocalVariableDeclaration declareMethodCall(IProgramVariable variable, ReferencePrefix reference, String method)
      Create a local variable declaration that assigns a method's return value initially. 
      type variable = reference.method();
      where type is variable's KeYJavaType as it is returned by IProgramVariable.getKeYJavaType().
      Parameters:
      variable - the named and typed IProgramVariable to be declared
      reference - the ReferencePrefix the method is called on
      method - the method's name String
      Returns:
      a new LocalVariableDeclaration of variable with static type type and initial value reference.method()

    • defaultBlock

      public static Default defaultBlock(ExtList parameters)
      Create a default block.
      Parameters:
      parameters - the default block parameters (body) as ExtList
      Returns:
      a new Default as defined by parameters

    • defaultBlock

      public static Default defaultBlock(Statement statement)
      Create a default block. 
      default
    statement
      Parameters:
      statement - the to be executed Statement
      Returns:
      a new Default that contains statement

    • defaultBlock

      public static Default defaultBlock(Statement[] statements)
      Create a default block. 
      default {
    statements
}
      Parameters:
      statements - the to be executed Statements
      Returns:
      a new Default that contains statements

    • doLoop

      public static Do doLoop(Expression condition, Statement statement, PositionInfo positionInfo)
      Create a do loop. 
      do
    statement
while (condition);
      Parameters:
      condition - the do-loop condition Expression
      statement - the do-loop body Statement
      positionInfo - the new source element's PositionInfo
      Returns:
      a new Do that executes statement while condition holds

    • elseBlock

      public static Else elseBlock(ExtList parameters)
      Create an else block.
      Parameters:
      parameters - the else block parameters (body) as ExtList
      Returns:
      a new Else as defined by parameters

    • elseBlock

      public static Else elseBlock(Statement statement)
      Create an else block. 
      else
    statement
      Parameters:
      statement - the Statement to be executed
      Returns:
      a new Else block consisting of statement solely

    • elseBlock

      public static Else elseBlock(Statement[] statements)
      Create an else block. 
      else {
    statements
}
      Parameters:
      statements - the Statements to be executed
      Returns:
      a new Else block consisting of statements solely

    • loopInit

      public static ILoopInit loopInit(LoopInitializer init)
      Create a loop initialization that consists of a single statement. 
      init
      Parameters:
      init - the single LoopInitializer
      Returns:
      a new ILoopInit that consists of init only

    • loopInitZero

      public static ILoopInit loopInitZero(KeYJavaType type, IProgramVariable variable)
      Create a loop initialization that declares and assigns zero to a local variable. 
      type variable = 0
      Parameters:
      type - the static KeYJavaType of variable
      variable - the named and typed IProgramVariable to be declared
      Returns:
      a new ILoopInit that declares variable variable with static type type and initial value zero

    • arrayInitializer

      public static ArrayInitializer arrayInitializer(Expression[] expressions, KeYJavaType type)
      Create an array initializer.
      Parameters:
      expressions - the initial value Expressions
      type - the array type KeYJavaType
      Returns:
      a new ArrayInitializer which contains expressions and is of type type

    • arrayLength

      public static FieldReference arrayLength(JavaInfo model, ReferencePrefix array)
      Create an array length access. 
      array.length
      Parameters:
      model - the JavaInfo to retrieve the array super class type, which holds the length attribute, from
      array - the ReferencePrefix whose length attribute is accessed
      Returns:
      a new FieldReference for array's length attribute

    • lessThanGuard

      public static IGuard lessThanGuard(Expression left, Expression right)
      Create a condition that compares two expressions using the less than operator. 
      left < right
      Parameters:
      left - the Expression to be compared less than right
      right - the Expression to be compared greater than left
      Returns:
      a new Guard that compares left less than right

    • lessThanOperator

      public static LessThan lessThanOperator(Expression left, Expression right)
      Create a less than operator. 
      left < right
      Parameters:
      left - the left operand Expression
      right - the right operand Expression
      Returns:
      a new LessThan that compares left less than right

    • lessThanZeroOperator

      public static LessThan lessThanZeroOperator(Expression expression)
      Create a less than zero operator. 
      expression < 0
      Parameters:
      expression - the left operand Expression
      Returns:
      a new LessThan that compares expression less than 0

    • lessThanArrayLengthGuard

      public static IGuard lessThanArrayLengthGuard(JavaInfo model, ProgramVariable variable, ReferencePrefix array)
      Create a condition that compares a variable and an array length using the less than operator. 
      variable < array.length
      Parameters:
      model - the JavaInfo to retrieve the array super class type, which holds the length attribute, from
      variable - the ProgramVariable to be compared less than array's length
      array - the ReferencePrefix whose length attribute is accessed
      Returns:
      a new Guard that compares variable less than array's length

    • forUpdates

      public static IForUpdates forUpdates(Expression update)
      Create a list of loop updates that consists of a single expression. 
      update
      Parameters:
      update - the single update Expression
      Returns:
      a new ForUpdates that consists of update only

    • postIncrementForUpdates

      public static IForUpdates postIncrementForUpdates(ProgramVariable variable)
      Create a loop update expression that post increments a given variable. 
      variable++
      Parameters:
      variable - the ProgramVariable to be post incremented during the loop updates
      Returns:
      a new ForUpdates that consists of the post increment of variable

    • arrayFieldAccess

      public static ArrayReference arrayFieldAccess(ReferencePrefix array, Expression index)
      Create an array field access with a single index. 
      array[index]
      Parameters:
      array - the ReferencePrefix to be accessed
      index - the array access index Expression
      Returns:
      a new ArrayReference for access of array at index

    • block

      public static StatementBlock block(ExtList statements)
      Create a block from an arbitrary number of statements.
      Parameters:
      statements - the block statements as ExtList
      Returns:
      a new StatementBlock consisting of statements

    • block

      public static StatementBlock block(Statement... statements)
      Create a block from an arbitrary number of statements. 
      {
  statements;
}
      Parameters:
      statements - the Statements to appear in the block
      Returns:
      a new StatementBlock that consists of the given statements in the very same order

    • block

      public static StatementBlock block(List<Statement> statements)
      Create a block from an arbitrary number of statements. 
      {
  statements;
}
      Parameters:
      statements - the Statements to appear in the block
      Returns:
      a new StatementBlock that consists of the given statements in the very same order

    • forLoop

      public static For forLoop(ExtList parameters)
      Create a for loop.
      Parameters:
      parameters - the loop definition parameters (initializer, guard, updates, body) as ExtList
      Returns:
      a new For as defined by parameters

    • forLoop

      public static For forLoop(ILoopInit init, IGuard guard, IForUpdates updates, Statement... statements)
      Create a for loop from the loop definition and an arbitrary number of body statements. 
      for (init; guard; updates) {
   statements;
}
      Parameters:
      init - the ILoopInit loop initializations
      guard - the IGuard loop condition
      updates - the IForUpdates loop updates
      statements - the body Statements
      Returns:
      a new For with initializers init, condition guard, updates updates and body statements

    • forLoop

      public static For forLoop(IGuard guard, IForUpdates updates, Statement body)
      Create a for loop with no initializer. 
      for (; guard; updates)
    body
      Parameters:
      guard - the IGuard loop condition
      updates - the IForUpdates loop updates
      body - the body Statement
      Returns:
      a new For with condition guard, updates updates and body body

    • forLoop

      public static For forLoop(IGuard guard, IForUpdates updates, Statement[] body)
      Create a for loop with no initializer. 
      for (; guard; updates)
    body
      Parameters:
      guard - the IGuard loop condition
      updates - the IForUpdates loop updates
      body - the body Statements
      Returns:
      a new For with condition guard, updates updates and body body

    • assignArrayField

      public static CopyAssignment assignArrayField(ProgramVariable variable, ReferencePrefix array, Expression index)
      Create a statement that assigns an array element to a variable. 
      variable = array[index];
      Parameters:
      variable - the ProgramVariable to be assigned to
      array - the array ReferencePrefix to be accessed
      index - the array access index Expression
      Returns:
      a new CopyAssignment of array element at index to variable

    • declare

      public static LocalVariableDeclaration declare(ExtList parameters)
      Create a local variable declaration without initialization.
      Parameters:
      parameters - the declaration parameters (modifiers, type reference, variable specifications) as ExtList
      Returns:
      a new LocalVariableDeclaration as defined by parameters

    • declare

      public static LocalVariableDeclaration declare(IProgramVariable variable)
      Create a local variable declaration without initialization. 
      type variable;
      where type is variable's KeYJavaType as it is returned by IProgramVariable.getKeYJavaType().
      Parameters:
      variable - the named and typed IProgramVariable to be declared
      Returns:
      a new LocalVariableDeclaration of variable

    • declare

      public static LocalVariableDeclaration declare(IProgramVariable variable, Expression init)
      Create a local variable declaration. 
      type variable = init;
      where type is variable's KeYJavaType as it is returned by IProgramVariable.getKeYJavaType().
      Parameters:
      variable - the named and typed IProgramVariable to be declared
      init - the Expression variable is initialized with
      Returns:
      a new LocalVariableDeclaration of variable

    • declare

      public static LocalVariableDeclaration declare(Modifier modifier, IProgramVariable variable, Expression init, KeYJavaType type)
      Create a local variable declaration with a single modifier. 
      modifier type variable = init;
      Parameters:
      modifier - the Modifier
      variable - the named and typed IProgramVariable to be declared
      init - the Expression variable is initialized with
      type - the static KeYJavaType of variable
      Returns:
      a new LocalVariableDeclaration of variable with static type type and initial value init

    • declare

      public static LocalVariableDeclaration declare(Modifier[] modifiers, IProgramVariable variable, Expression init, KeYJavaType type)
      Create a local variable declaration with an arbitrary number of modifiers. 
      modifiers type variable = init;
      Parameters:
      modifiers - the Modifiers
      variable - the named and typed IProgramVariable to be declared
      init - the Expression variable is initialized with
      type - the static KeYJavaType of variable
      Returns:
      a new LocalVariableDeclaration of variable with static type type and initial value init

    • declare

      public static LocalVariableDeclaration declare(ImmutableArray<Modifier> modifiers, IProgramVariable variable, Expression init, KeYJavaType type)
      Create a local variable declaration with an arbitrary number of modifiers. 
      modifiers type variable = init;
      Parameters:
      modifiers - the Modifiers
      variable - the named and typed IProgramVariable to be declared
      init - the Expression variable is initialized with
      type - the static KeYJavaType of variable
      Returns:
      a new LocalVariableDeclaration of variable with static type type and initial value init

    • declare

      public static LocalVariableDeclaration declare(ImmutableArray<Modifier> modifiers, IProgramVariable variable, Expression init, TypeReference typeRef)
      Create a local variable declaration with an arbitrary number of modifiers. 
      modifiers typeRef variable = init;
      Parameters:
      modifiers - the Modifiers
      variable - the named and typed IProgramVariable to be declared
      init - the Expression variable is initialized with
      typeRef - the static TypeRef of variable
      Returns:
      a new LocalVariableDeclaration of variable with static type typeRef and initial value init

    • declare

      public static LocalVariableDeclaration declare(ImmutableArray<Modifier> modifiers, TypeReference typeRef, VariableSpecification specification)
      Create a local variable declaration. 
      modifiers typeRef specification
      Parameters:
      modifiers - the Modifiers
      typeRef - the static TypeRef of the variable to be declared
      specification - the VariableSpecification of the variable to be declared
      Returns:
      a new LocalVariableDeclaration of the variable specified by specification with static type typeRef

    • declare

      public static LocalVariableDeclaration declare(ImmutableArray<Modifier> modifiers, TypeReference typeRef, VariableSpecification[] specifications)
      Create local variable declarations. 
      modifiers typeRef specification{1}, ...
      Parameters:
      modifiers - the Modifiers
      typeRef - the static TypeRef of the variable to be declared
      specifications - the VariableSpecifications of the variables to be declared
      Returns:
      a new LocalVariableDeclaration of the variables specified by specifications with static type typeRef

    • methodCall

      public static MethodReference methodCall(ReferencePrefix reference, String name, ImmutableArray<? extends Expression> args)
      Create a method call. 
      reference.name(args);
      Parameters:
      reference - the ReferencePrefix the method is called on
      name - the method's name String
      args - the argument Expressions to be passed to the method
      Returns:
      a new MethodReference for call of method name on reference with arguments args

    • methodCall

      public static MethodReference methodCall(KeYJavaType type, String name, ImmutableArray<? extends Expression> args)
      Create a method call on a type. 
      type.name(args);
      Parameters:
      type - the KeYJavaType the method is called on
      name - the method's name String
      args - the argument Expressions to be passed to the method
      Returns:
      a new MethodReference for call of method name on type with arguments args

    • methodCall

      public static MethodReference methodCall(KeYJavaType type, String name, Expression... args)
      Create a method call on a type. 
      type.name(args);
      Parameters:
      type - the KeYJavaType the method is called on
      name - the method's name String
      args - the argument Expressions to be passed to the method
      Returns:
      a new MethodReference for call of method name on type with arguments args

    • methodCall

      public static MethodReference methodCall(KeYJavaType type, String name)
      Create a method call on a type with no arguments. 
      type.name();
      Parameters:
      type - the KeYJavaType the method is called on
      name - the method's name String
      Returns:
      a new MethodReference for call of method name on type with arguments args

    • methodCall

      public static MethodReference methodCall(ReferencePrefix reference, String name)
      Create a method call with no arguments. 
      reference.name();
      Parameters:
      reference - the ReferencePrefix the method is called on
      name - the method's name String
      Returns:
      a new MethodReference for call of method name on reference with no arguments

    • methodCall

      public static MethodReference methodCall(ReferencePrefix reference, String name, Expression... args)
      Create a method call. 
      reference.name(args);
      Parameters:
      reference - the ReferencePrefix the method is called on
      name - the method's name String
      args - the argument Expressions to be passed to the method
      Returns:
      a new MethodReference for call of method name on reference with arguments args

    • methodCall

      public static MethodReference methodCall(ReferencePrefix reference, MethodName name, Expression... args)
      Create a method call. 
      reference.name(args);
      Parameters:
      reference - the ReferencePrefix the method is called on
      name - the MethodName
      args - the argument Expressions to be passed to the method
      Returns:
      a new MethodReference for call of method name on reference with arguments args

    • methodCall

      public static MethodReference methodCall(ReferencePrefix reference, MethodName name, ImmutableArray<? extends Expression> args)
      Create a method call. 
      reference.name(args);
      Parameters:
      reference - the ReferencePrefix the method is called on
      name - the MethodName
      args - the argument Expressions to be passed to the method
      Returns:
      a new MethodReference for call of method name on reference with arguments args

    • fieldReference

      public static FieldReference fieldReference(Services services, String name, Expression expression, ExecutionContext context)
      Create a field access. 
      (expression).name
      Parameters:
      services - the Services to determine both expression 's KeYJavaType and the ProgramVariable corresponding to the field name
      name - the to be accessed field's name String
      expression - the Expression on which the field is accessed
      context - the ExecutionContext, which is needed to determine expression's KeYJavaType
      Returns:
      a new FieldReference of field name on expression

    • fieldReference

      public static FieldReference fieldReference(ReferencePrefix prefix, ProgramVariable field)
      Create a field access. 
      prefix.field
      Parameters:
      prefix - the ReferencePrefix on which field is accessed
      field - the ProgramVariable to be accessed
      Returns:
      a new FieldReference of field on prefix

    • finallyBlock

      public static Finally finallyBlock(ExtList parameters)
      Create a finally block.
      Parameters:
      parameters - the finally block parameters (body) as ExtList
      Returns:
      a new Finally as defined by parameters

    • finallyBlock

      public static Finally finallyBlock(Statement statement)
      Create a finally block. 
      finally
    statement
      Parameters:
      statement - the Statement to be executed
      Returns:
      a new Finally block consisting of statement solely

    • finallyBlock

      public static Finally finallyBlock(Statement[] statements)
      Create a finally block. 
      finally {
    statements
}
      Parameters:
      statements - the Statements to be executed
      Returns:
      a new Finally block consisting of statements solely

    • finallyBlock

      public static Finally finallyBlock(StatementBlock body)
      Create a finally block. 
      finally
    body
      Parameters:
      body - the StatementBlock to be executed
      Returns:
      a new Finally block consisting of body solely

    • declare

      public static ProgramElement declare(ImmutableArray<Modifier> modifiers, IProgramVariable variable, Expression init, ProgramElementName typeName, int dimensions, ReferencePrefix typePrefix, KeYJavaType baseType)
      Create a local array variable declaration with an arbitrary number of modifiers. 
      modifiers typePrefix.baseType[] variable = init;
      Parameters:
      modifiers - the Modifiers
      variable - the named and typed IProgramVariable to be declared
      init - the Expression variable is initialized with
      typeName - the type's ProgramElementName
      dimensions - the type's dimensions
      typePrefix - the type's ReferencePrefix
      baseType - the base KeYJavaType
      Returns:
      a new LocalVariableDeclaration of variable with static type baseType[dimensions] and initial value init

    • methodBody

      public static MethodBodyStatement methodBody(JavaInfo model, ProgramVariable result, ReferencePrefix reference, KeYJavaType classType, String methodName, ProgramVariable[] arguments)
      Create a method body shortcut. Note that classType is also used as visibility context when looking for methodName in its definition.
      Parameters:
      model - the JavaInfo that contains classType.methodName
      result - the ProgramVariable the return value is assigned to or null
      reference - the ReferencePrefix invocation target
      classType - the KeYJavaType in which the method is declared
      methodName - the method's String name
      arguments - the ProgramVariable and their static types the method is called with
      Returns:
      a new MethodBodyStatement for classType.methodName when called with arguments or null when the former is not defined

    • methodBody

      public static MethodBodyStatement methodBody(ProgramVariable result, ReferencePrefix reference, IProgramMethod method, Expression[] arguments)
      Create a method body shortcut.
      Parameters:
      result - the ProgramVariable the return value is assigned to or null
      reference - the ReferencePrefix invocation target
      method - the IProgramMethod reference
      arguments - the Expressions and their static types the method is called with
      Returns:
      a new MethodBodyStatement for method when called with arguments

    • methodBody

      public static MethodBodyStatement methodBody(ProgramVariable result, ReferencePrefix reference, IProgramMethod method, ImmutableArray<Expression> arguments)
      Create a method body shortcut.
      Parameters:
      result - the ProgramVariable the return value is assigned to or null
      reference - the ReferencePrefix invocation target
      method - the IProgramMethod reference
      arguments - the Expressions and their static types the method is called with
      Returns:
      a new MethodBodyStatement for method when called with arguments

    • methodFrame

      public static MethodFrame methodFrame(IExecutionContext executionContext, StatementBlock block)
      Create a method call substitution.
      Parameters:
      executionContext - the block's IExecutionContext
      block - the StatementBlock to be put in executionContext
      Returns:
      a new MethodFrame that associates block with executionContext

    • methodFrame

      public static MethodFrame methodFrame(IExecutionContext executionContext, StatementBlock block, PositionInfo position)
      Create a method call substitution at a specific source position.
      Parameters:
      executionContext - the block's IExecutionContext
      block - the StatementBlock to be put in executionContext
      position - the new source element's PositionInfo
      Returns:
      a new MethodFrame that associates block with executionContext and positions it at position

    • methodFrame

      public static MethodFrame methodFrame(IProgramVariable result, IExecutionContext executionContext, StatementBlock block)
      Create a method call substitution with a return value assignment.
      Parameters:
      result - the IProgramVariable block's return value is assigned to
      executionContext - the block's IExecutionContext
      block - the StatementBlock to be put in executionContext
      Returns:
      a new MethodFrame that associates block with executionContext

    • methodFrame

      public static MethodFrame methodFrame(IProgramVariable result, IExecutionContext executionContext, StatementBlock block, PositionInfo position)
      Create a method call substitution with a return value assignment at a specific source position.
      Parameters:
      result - the IProgramVariable block's return value is assigned to
      executionContext - the block's IExecutionContext
      block - the StatementBlock to be put in executionContext
      position - the new source element's PositionInfo
      Returns:
      a new MethodFrame that associates block with executionContext and positions it at position

    • intLiteral

      public static IntLiteral intLiteral(Integer value)
      Create an integer literal.
      Parameters:
      value - the Integer to be turned into an literal
      Returns:
      a new IntLiteral representing value

    • labeledStatement

      public static LabeledStatement labeledStatement(ExtList parameters, Label label, PositionInfo position)
      Create a labeled statement.
      Parameters:
      parameters - the parameters (statement) as ExtList
      label - the Label
      position - the new source element's PositionInfo
      Returns:
      a new LabeledStatement as defined by parameters and label

    • labeledStatement

      public static LabeledStatement labeledStatement(Label label, Statement statement, PositionInfo pos)
      Create a labeled statement. 
      label: statement
      Parameters:
      label - the Label
      statement - the Statement to be labeled
      Returns:
      a new LabeledStatement that adds label to statement

    • labeledStatement

      public static Statement labeledStatement(Label label, Statement[] statements, PositionInfo pos)
      Create a labeled block of statements. 
      label: {
    statements
}
      Parameters:
      label - the Label
      statements - the Statements to be labeled
      Returns:
      a new LabeledStatement that adds label to statements

    • newArray

      public static NewArray newArray(TypeReference typeRef, int dimensions, Expression[] sizes, ArrayInitializer initializer, KeYJavaType keyJavaType)
      Create an array instantiation. 
      new typeRef[sizes{1}]...[sizes{dimensions}] initializer
      Parameters:
      typeRef - the static array base type
      dimensions - the number of dimensions
      sizes - the size Expressions for each dimension
      initializer - the ArrayInitializer
      keyJavaType - the array element type
      Returns:
      a new NewArray for the instantiation of an array of base type typeRef with dimensions dimensions

    • newArray

      public static NewArray newArray(TypeReference typeRef, int dimensions, Expression[] sizes, KeYJavaType keyJavaType)
      Create an array instantiation. 
      new typeRef[sizes{1}]...[sizes{dimensions}]
      Parameters:
      typeRef - the static array base type
      dimensions - the number of dimensions
      sizes - the size Expressions for each dimension
      keyJavaType - the array element type
      Returns:
      a new NewArray for the instantiation of an array of base type typeRef with dimensions dimensions

    • newArray

      public static NewArray newArray(TypeReference typeRef, int dimensions, Expression size, KeYJavaType keyJavaType)
      Create an array instantiation. 
      new typeRef[size]
      Parameters:
      typeRef - the static array base type
      dimensions - the number of dimensions
      size - the size Expression for the first dimension
      keyJavaType - the array element type
      Returns:
      a new NewArray for the instantiation of an array of base type typeRef with dimensions dimensions

    • newArray

      public static NewArray newArray(TypeReference typeRef, int dimensions, ArrayInitializer initializer, KeYJavaType keyJavaType)
      Create an array instantiation. 
      new typeRef[]...[] initializer
      Parameters:
      typeRef - the static array base type
      dimensions - the number of dimensions
      initializer - the ArrayInitializer
      keyJavaType - the array element type
      Returns:
      a new NewArray for the instantiation of an array of base type typeRef with dimensions dimensions

    • newOperator

      public static New newOperator(ReferencePrefix referencePrefix, TypeReference typeReference, Expression[] args)
      Create an object allocation. 
      new referencePrefix.typeReference(args)
      Parameters:
      referencePrefix - the typeReference's ReferencePrefix
      typeReference - a TypeReference to the class type that is instantiated
      args - the Expression arguments to be passed to the constructor
      Returns:
      a new New operator that allocates a new instance of typeReference parameterized with args

    • newOperator

      public static New newOperator(ReferencePrefix referencePrefix, KeYJavaType type, Expression[] args)
      Create an object allocation. 
      new referencePrefix.type(args)
      Parameters:
      referencePrefix - the type's ReferencePrefix
      type - the KeYJavaType to be instantiated
      args - the Expression arguments to be passed to the constructor
      Returns:
      a new New operator that allocates a new instance of type parameterized with args

    • newOperator

      public static New newOperator(ReferencePrefix referencePrefix, KeYJavaType type)
      Create an object allocation without arguments. 
      new referencePrefix.type()
      Parameters:
      referencePrefix - the type's ReferencePrefix
      type - the KeYJavaType to be instantiated
      Returns:
      a new New operator that allocates a new instance of type

    • newOperator

      public static New newOperator(KeYJavaType type)
      Create an object allocation without arguments. 
      new type()
      Parameters:
      type - the KeYJavaType to be instantiated
      Returns:
      a new New operator that allocates a new instance of type

    • notEqualsOperator

      public static NotEquals notEqualsOperator(ExtList operands)
      Create an unequal operator. 
      operands{1} != operands{2}
      Parameters:
      operands - the operands ExtList
      Returns:
      a new NotEquals of operands

    • superConstructor

      public static SuperConstructorReference superConstructor(ReferencePrefix referencePrefix, Expression[] args)
      Create a call to the super constructor. 
      super(args)
      Parameters:
      referencePrefix - the enclosing class type
      args - the Expression arguments to be passed to constructor
      Returns:
      a new SuperConstructorReference parameterized with args

    • superReference

      public static SuperReference superReference()
      Create a reference to super.
      Returns:
      a new SuperReference

    • switchBlock

      public static Switch switchBlock(Expression expression, Branch[] branches)
      Create a switch block. 
      switch (expression) {
    branches
}
      Parameters:
      expression - the to be evaluated Expression
      branches - the switch-case Branches
      Returns:
      a new Switch block that executes branches depending on the value of expression

    • switchBlock

      public static Switch switchBlock(ExtList parameters)
      Create a switch block.
      Parameters:
      parameters - the switch-case parameters (guard, body, branches) as ExtList
      Returns:
      a new Switch as defined by parameters

    • synchronizedBlock

      public static SynchronizedBlock synchronizedBlock(ExtList parameters)
      Create a synchronized block.
      Parameters:
      parameters - the synchronized block parameters (monitor, body) as ExtList
      Returns:
      a new SynchronizedBlock as defined by parameters

    • thenBlock

      public static Then thenBlock(ExtList parameters)
      Create a then block.
      Parameters:
      parameters - the then block parameters (body) as ExtList
      Returns:
      a new Then as defined by parameters

    • thenBlock

      public static Then thenBlock(Statement statement)
      Create a then block. 
      then
    statement
      Parameters:
      statement - the to be executed Statement
      Returns:
      a new Then block that consists of statement solely

    • thenBlock

      public static Then thenBlock(Statement[] statements)
      Create a then block. 
      then {
    statements
}
      Parameters:
      statements - the to be executed Statements
      Returns:
      a new Then block that consists of statements solely

    • thisConstructor

      public static ThisConstructorReference thisConstructor(Expression[] args)
      Create a call to a constructor of the current class. 
      this(args)
      Parameters:
      args - the Expression arguments to be passed to constructor
      Returns:
      a new ThisConstructorReference parameterized with args

    • thisReference

      public static ThisReference thisReference()
      Create a reference to this.
      Returns:
      a new ThisReference

    • trueLiteral

      public static BooleanLiteral trueLiteral()
      Create a literal for the truth value true.
      Returns:
      a BooleanLiteral that represents the value true

    • tryBlock

      public static Try tryBlock(ExtList parameters)
      Create a try block.
      Parameters:
      parameters - the try-catch parameters (body, branches) as ExtList
      Returns:
      a new Try as defined by parameters

    • tryBlock

      public static Try tryBlock(StatementBlock body, Branch[] branches)
      Create a try block. 
      try
    body
branches
      Parameters:
      body - the StatementBlock to be executed
      branches - the try-catch Branches
      Returns:
      a new Try block for the execution of branches depending on the events during the execution of body

    • tryBlock

      public static Try tryBlock(Statement statement, Branch[] branches)
      Create a try block. 
      try
    statement
branches
      Parameters:
      statement - the Statement to be executed
      branches - the try-catch Branches
      Returns:
      a new Try block for the execution of branches depending on the events during the execution of statement

    • tryBlock

      public static Try tryBlock(Statement statement, Branch branch)
      Create a try block. 
      try
    statement
branch
      Parameters:
      statement - the Statement to be executed
      branch - the try-catch Branch
      Returns:
      a new Try block for the execution of branch depending on the events during the execution of statement

    • typeRef

      public static TypeRef typeRef(KeYJavaType type)
      Create a type reference. 
      type
      Parameters:
      type - the KeYJavaType to be referenced
      Returns:
      a new TypeRef that references type

    • typeRef

      public static TypeRef typeRef(KeYJavaType type, int dimensions)
      Create a type reference. 
      type[]...[]
      Parameters:
      type - the base KeYJavaType
      dimensions - the number of dimensions
      Returns:
      a new TypeRef for dimensions dimensions of type

    • falseLiteral

      public static BooleanLiteral falseLiteral()
      Create a literal for the truth value false.
      Returns:
      a BooleanLiteral that represents the value true

    • variableSpecification

      public static VariableSpecification variableSpecification(IProgramVariable variable, int dimensions, Expression initializer, Type type)
      Create a variable specification.
      Parameters:
      variable - the IProgramVariable to be specified
      dimensions - the number of dimensions
      initializer - the initializer Expression
      type - the Type
      Returns:
      a new VariableSpecification for variable of type type[dimensions], initialized to initializer

    • variableSpecification

      public static VariableSpecification variableSpecification(IProgramVariable variable, Expression initializer, KeYJavaType keyJavaType)
      Create a variable specification.
      Parameters:
      variable - the IProgramVariable to be specified
      initializer - the initializer Expression
      keyJavaType - the KeYJavaType
      Returns:
      a new VariableSpecification for variable of type type, initialized to initializer

    • zeroLiteral

      public static IntLiteral zeroLiteral()
      Create a literal for the integer zero. 
      0
      Returns:
      a new IntLiteral that represents the integer value 0

      public static TypeCast cast(Expression expression, KeYJavaType targetType)
